name: Material Bench
summary: PBR material showcase. A central chrome sphere with 12 smaller spheres orbiting it on a ring of cement cylinder pedestals; HDR environment, ACES filmic tonemap. Use it to compare standard vs physical shader parameters side-by-side.

extensionPoints.summary: Adjust roughness / metalness / clearcoat / transmission on an existing material manifest.
Add a new material manifest and reference it from `OUTER_MATERIALS` in bootstrap.ts.
Replace the HDR file under `assets/runtime/hdr/` and update the scene's `environment.url`.
The group spin lives on `spheres.root.Spin`. Adjust `speed` (degrees per second) or `axis` in the scene.
